lines.name: Amanamu's Gaze

explicitModifiers.text: +(5-6) to all Attributes

Minions have +6% to Damage over Time Multiplier per
Ghastly Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +30%

lines.flavourText: The Liege of the Lightless seeks dominion over the surface dwellers.

lines.name: Emperor's Cunning

explicitModifiers.text: 4% increased Dexterity
20% increased Global Accuracy Rating
3% increased Character Size

lines.flavourText:
The greatest victories happen
before the battle has begun.

lines.name: Inspired Learning

explicitModifiers.text: With 4 Notables Allocated in Radius, When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain 1 of its Modifiers for 20 seconds

lines.flavourText:
If you do not learn from a won battle
then you have already lost the war.

lines.name: Rain of Splinters
lines.flavourText:
"If one is an annoyance
then a hundred is a threat."
- Ancient Karui Proverb

lines.name: Foulborn The Green Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: Cold Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Suppressed Spell Damage Recently

lines.flavourText:
We climb like vines up Chayula's arms,
reaching into the world that should be ours.

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Dream

explicitModifiers.text: Gain (6-10)% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage

mutatedModifiers.text:
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Life at 50% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: Foulborn The Blue Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: +3% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Power Charge

lines.flavourText:
We crash against Chayula's body,
and fall like rain into the place we cannot go.

lines.name: Foulborn The Blue Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: Lightning Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked Spell Damage Recently

lines.flavourText:
We crash against Chayula's body,
and fall like rain into the place we cannot go.

lines.name: Kurgal's Gaze

explicitModifiers.text: +(12-13) to Intelligence

8% increased Effect of Arcane Surge on you per
Hypnotic Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 40%

lines.flavourText: The Blackblooded seeks dominion over darkness itself.

lines.name: Unnatural Instinct

explicitModifiers.text: Allocated Small Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing
Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Small Passive Skills in Radius

lines.flavourText:
"I don't know how I know, 
I just know that I know."

lines.name: Foulborn The Green Dream

explicitModifiers.text: Gain (6-10)% of Cold Damage as Extra Chaos Damage

mutatedModifiers.text:
Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Mana at 75% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We climb like vines up Chayula's arms,
reaching into the world that should be ours.

lines.name: Primordial Eminence

explicitModifiers.text: Golems have (16-19)% increased Attack and Cast Speed
30% increased Effect of Buffs granted by your Golems
Golems have +926 to Armour
Primordial

lines.flavourText:
"Kings fall, empires crumble, mortals perish.
All turn to earth and sand."
- Maraketh proverb

lines.name: Healthy Mind
lines.flavourText: For the ambitious, flesh is a limitation.

lines.name: Tempered Mind

explicitModifiers.text: -1 Intelligence per 1 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% increased Mana Recovery Rate per 10 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius

lines.flavourText:
Any thought, no matter how fleeting, changes the thinker.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence}

lines.name: Glorious Vanity

explicitModifiers.text:
Bathed in the blood of (3221-3239) sacrificed in the name of Doryani
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Vaal
Historic

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves the pinnacle of civilisation, but that height toppled their empire.

lines.name: Brutal Restraint

explicitModifiers.text:
Denoted service of (3891-5662) dekhara in the akhara of Asenath
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Maraketh
Historic

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves the most ordered, but that tradition turned their forests to salt.

lines.name: Apex Mode

explicitModifiers.text: 22% increased Spell Damage
Spells have 10% reduced Critical Strike Chance per Intensity
Spells which have gained Intensity Recently gain 1 Intensity every 0.5 Seconds

lines.flavourText: Maximum power fueled by science gone mad.

lines.name: Ulaman's Gaze

explicitModifiers.text: +(13-15) to Dexterity

Projectiles have 4% chance to be able to Chain when colliding with terrain per
Searching Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 20%

lines.flavourText: The Sovereign of the Well seeks dominion over the light.

lines.name: Tecrod's Gaze

explicitModifiers.text: +14 to Strength

40% increased Main Hand Critical Strike Chance per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 200%

+20% to Off Hand Critical Strike Multiplier per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +100%

lines.flavourText: The Hated Slave seeks dominion over his own kind.

lines.name: Seething Fury
lines.flavourText:
The enslaved Ezomyte clans were not permitted to own weapons.
For years, they trained in secret, watching and waiting for the
perfect moment to reveal the true depth of the Empire's folly.

lines.name: Dissolution of the Flesh

explicitModifiers.text: Removes all Energy Shield

Life that would be lost by taking Damage is instead Reserved
until you take no Damage to Life for 2 seconds
(20-30)% more Maximum Life

lines.flavourText:
"We awoke to a sudden dawn cresting through the mountains.
Each peak rose into searing fire, a massive roiling tide.
A great eye gazed upon us, and we became known—utterly."

lines.name: Bloodnotch

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% of Damage taken from Stunning Hits is Recovered as Life

lines.flavourText:
At the core of the warrior's spirit,
a fierce determination burns,
igniting their capacity to endure.

lines.name: Foulborn The Blue Dream

explicitModifiers.text: Gain (6-10)% of Lightning Damage as Extra Chaos Damage

mutatedModifiers.text:
Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Energy Shield at 75% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We crash against Chayula's body,
and fall like rain into the place we cannot go.

lines.name: Fortress Covenant
lines.flavourText: Forsake what you might have had. Command power beyond your potential.

lines.name: The Light of Meaning

explicitModifiers.text: Passive Skills in Radius also grant 7% increased Armour
Passive Skills in Radius also grant 5% increased Global Critical Strike Chance
Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to maximum Life
Passive Skills in Radius also grant +4% to Chaos Resistance

lines.flavourText: To name a thing is to give it power.

lines.name: Stormshroud

explicitModifiers.text: +(10-15)% to Lightning Resistance
Modifiers to Chance to Avoid being Shocked apply to all Elemental Ailments

lines.flavourText:
The true secret of the elements
is that all are one and the same.

lines.name: Primordial Harmony

explicitModifiers.text: Golem Skills have (20-29)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Summoned Golems have (31-39)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
(19-20)% increased Golem Damage for each Type of Golem you have Summoned
Summoned Golems Regenerate 2% of their Life per second
Primordial

lines.flavourText:
"A stone is not a stone.
It is but one part of a fortress."
- Ezomyte proverb

lines.name: Militant Faith

explicitModifiers.text:
Carved to glorify (4875-6330) new faithful converted by High Templar Maxarius
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Templars
4% increased Brand Damage per 10 Devotion
+2% to all Elemental Resistances per 10 Devotion
4% increased Area Damage per 10 Devotion
4% increased Totem Damage per 10 Devotion
1% reduced Mana Cost of Skills per 10 Devotion
3% increased Effect of non-Damaging Ailments on Enemies per 10 Devotion
Historic

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves the utmost faithful, but that conviction became oppression.

lines.name: Watcher's Eye

explicitModifiers.text: 61% of Physical Damage from your Hits cannot be Reflected while affected by Determination
(4-6)% increased maximum Energy Shield
(4-6)% increased maximum Life
You take 53% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes while affected by Determination
Adds 67 to 104 Cold Damage while affected by Hatred
46% increased Attack Damage while affected by Precision
(54-61)% increased Life Recovery from Flasks while affected by Vitality
+850 to Armour while affected by Determination
Consecrated Ground you create while affected by Zealotry causes enemies to take 10% increased Damage
You gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill while affected by Haste
+1% to all maximum Elemental Resistances while affected by Purity of Elements
13% of Cold and Lightning Damage taken as Fire Damage while affected by Purity of Fire
+7% chance to Evade Attack Hits while affected by Grace
Critical Strikes Penetrate 10% of Enemy Elemental Resistances while affected by Zealotry
(4-6)% increased maximum Mana
+(5-7)% Chance to Block Spell Damage while affected by Discipline
+1.63% to Critical Strike Chance while affected by Hatred
1.25% of Fire Damage Leeched as Life while affected by Anger
Immune to Ignite while affected by Purity of Fire
+13% chance to Suppress Spell Damage while affected by Grace
Unaffected by Enfeeble while affected by Grace
Unaffected by Poison while affected by Malevolence
13% increased Life Recovery Rate while affected by Vitality
46% increased Fire Damage while affected by Anger
16% of Damage taken while affected by Clarity Recouped as Mana
44% increased Physical Damage while using Pride
16% of Fire and Lightning Damage taken as Cold Damage while affected by Purity of Ice
Gain 9% of Maximum Mana as Extra Maximum Energy Shield while affected by Clarity
+22% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence
Regenerate 1.03% of Life per second while affected by Vitality
Gain 15% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage while affected by Anger
Unaffected by Elemental Weakness while affected by Purity of Elements
Impales you inflict last 2 additional Hits while using Pride
Unaffected by Flammability while affected by Purity of Fire
8% increased Recovery rate of Life and Energy Shield while affected by Malevolence

lines.flavourText:
One by one, they stood their ground against a creature 
they had no hope of understanding, let alone defeating,
and one by one, they became a part of it.

lines.name: Lethal Pride

explicitModifiers.text:
Commanded leadership over (15081-16742) warriors under Kaom
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui

Commanded leadership over (14132-17862) warriors under Rakiata
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui

Commanded leadership over (10257-17704) warriors under Akoya
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui
Historic

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves the greatest warriors, but that savagery turned upon their own.

lines.name: Forbidden Flame
lines.flavourText:
The minds of those studied utterly by the Cleansing Fire
continue to think and dream and beg for silence...

lines.name: Forbidden Flesh
lines.flavourText:
The bodies of those wholly subsumed by the Tangle
continue to merge and mutate and cry out for release...

lines.name: Foulborn Lioneye's Fall

mutatedModifiers.text: Increases and Reductions to Evasion Rating in Radius are Transformed to apply to Armour

lines.flavourText:
The shield crab does not leave his shell unless it is forced to, 
and even then, it knows to keep its distance.

lines.name: Foulborn Firesong

explicitModifiers.text: +11% to Fire Resistance

lines.flavourText:
Within a firestorm, the Thane commands the flames
Emblazoned by glory and the song of the First Ones
For the master of fire fears nothing.

lines.name: The Interrogation

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Secrets of Suffering

lines.flavourText:
Pain is a fine motivator,
But if you seek the truth,
Fear of pain unknown has no parallel.

lines.name: Grand Spectrum

explicitModifiers.text: Minions have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Grand Spectrum
25% increased Critical Strike Chance per Grand Spectrum

lines.flavourText: Thoughts that shimmer like light across the rain.

lines.name: Emperor's Might

explicitModifiers.text: (4-6)% increased Strength
10% increased Damage
3% increased Character Size

lines.flavourText: Even an iron fist can be handled with grace.

lines.name: Elegant Hubris

explicitModifiers.text:
Commissioned 29100 coins to commemorate Caspiro
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire

Commissioned (26320-99500) coins to commemorate Victario
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire

Commissioned 105400 coins to commemorate Cadiro
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire
Historic

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves better than the past, but that confidence brought about nightmare.

lines.name: Heroic Tragedy

explicitModifiers.text:
Remembrancing (1623-2543) songworthy deeds by the line of Vorana
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur

Remembrancing (4493-6180) songworthy deeds by the line of Uhtred
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur

Remembrancing (6296-7163) songworthy deeds by the line of Medved
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur
Historic

lines.flavourText:
They believed themselves courageous and selfless,
but that bravery became the doom at their door.

lines.name: Ancestral Vision

explicitModifiers.text: +(5-10) to Dexterity
Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value

lines.flavourText:
The spirits of our ancestors guided us from the Archipelago to the continent.
Inextricably, the purity of our souls is linked to the ones who came before us.

lines.name: Quickening Covenant
lines.flavourText: Lose that which you never had. Gain power you could not have grasped.

lines.name: The Balance of Terror

explicitModifiers.text: +(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances
Immune to Exposure if you've cast Elemental Weakness in the past 10 seconds
(23-25)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate if you've cast Temporal Chains in the past 10 seconds
Inflict Withered for 2 seconds on Hit if you've cast Despair in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Freeze if you've cast Frostbite in the past 10 seconds
9% chance to deal Double Damage if you've cast Vulnerability in the past 10 seconds
Immune to Curses if you've cast Despair in the past 10 seconds
Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit if you've cast Flammability in the past 10 seconds
Gain (30-33)% of Physical Damage as a Random Element if you've cast Elemental Weakness in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Ignite if you've cast Flammability in the past 10 seconds
Take no Extra Damage from Critical Strikes if you've cast Enfeeble in the past 10 seconds
Cold Exposure on Hit if you've cast Frostbite in the past 10 seconds

lines.flavourText:
Fellshrine stood as a holy bastion opposite the
Chamber of Sins, and all that it represented.
For one to rise, the other must fall.

lines.name: Nadir Mode

explicitModifiers.text: (21-24)% increased Spell Damage
Spells have (39-48)% increased Critical Strike Chance per Intensity
Spells which have gained Intensity Recently lose 1 Intensity every 0.5 Seconds

lines.flavourText: Indiscriminate destruction fueled by science gone mad.

lines.name: Foulborn The Green Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: 1% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge

lines.flavourText:
We climb like vines up Chayula's arms,
reaching into the world that should be ours.

lines.name: Grand Spectrum

explicitModifiers.text: 12% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments per Grand Spectrum
15% increased Elemental Damage per Grand Spectrum

lines.flavourText: A mountain fortress safe from the storm.

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: Fire Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked an Attack Recently

lines.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: Tempered Flesh

explicitModifiers.text: -1 Strength per 1 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% increased Life Recovery Rate per 10 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius

lines.flavourText:
We are born raw and untested, and we are shaped by life.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence}

lines.name: Immutable Force

explicitModifiers.text: (510-996)% increased Stun and Block Recovery

lines.flavourText:
How simple a power, on which empires turn,
when one man stands firm and says, "I refuse."

lines.name: One With Nothing

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Hollow Palm Technique

lines.flavourText:
Once you begin to rely on your weapons, 
You ensure you can't live without them.

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Dream

explicitModifiers.text:
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill

mutatedModifiers.text: +4% to Chaos Resistance per Endurance Charge

lines.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: Melding of the Flesh

explicitModifiers.text: -(80-70)% to all Elemental Resistances
-(6-4)% to all maximum Elemental Resistances
Elemental Resistances are capped by your highest Maximum Elemental Resistance instead

lines.flavourText:
"We awoke to a sudden jungle rupturing the valleys of our home.
Grasping limbs coiled around us, into us. We sank into each other,
then rose into the living sky. My family screams alongside me still."

lines.name: Combat Focus

explicitModifiers.text: (10-14)% increased Elemental Damage
With 40 total Dexterity and Strength in Radius, Prismatic Skills deal 50% less Lightning Damage
With 40 total Dexterity and Strength in Radius, Prismatic Skills cannot choose Lightning

lines.flavourText:
Standing behind iron bars,
Daresso thought of his adoring fans cheering his name, 
his wife's warm embrace waiting for him, 
and of the celebrations that would soon be thrown in his name.
But when the arena gate lifted, he thought only of the fight.

lines.name: Intuitive Leap

explicitModifiers.text:
Passive Skills in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
Passage

lines.flavourText:
The carpenter who picks up a blade is not mad.
He's ambitious.

lines.name: Unending Hunger

explicitModifiers.text: Minions have (6-8)% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Raised Spectres have a 50% chance to gain Soul Eater for 20 seconds on Kill

lines.flavourText:
They roamed, they fed, they grew,
Killing as they went,
Conquer though they may,
Their hearts will never be content.

lines.name: Careful Planning
lines.flavourText:
"Greatly outnumbered, Deshret dressed her personal guard 
in identical garb. When the Empire rode north, Deshret and 
her guard took turns revealing themselves, creating the illusion 
of speed beyond the capabilities of even the Virtue Gems."
- History of the Maraketh

lines.name: Replica Fragility
lines.flavourText:
"Our defenses are failing at Outpost One. We can't hold out much
longer. All outposts, abandon your stations! Escape while you can!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, three hours post-Incident

lines.name: Energy From Within
lines.flavourText:
The Azmeri ascetics learnt the power
of going without the body's ordinary cravings.

lines.name: Grand Spectrum

explicitModifiers.text: +7% to all Elemental Resistances per Grand Spectrum
+1 to Minimum Endurance Charges per Grand Spectrum

lines.flavourText: A wellspring of vitality bubbling from within.

lines.name: Kitava's Teachings

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Disciple of Kitava

lines.flavourText:
Savour the bitter, cherish the sweet,
For there may never be another chance to eat.

lines.name: Natural Affinity

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Nature's Patience

lines.flavourText:
You can take the girl out of the woods, 
but you can't take the woods out of the girl.

lines.name: Calamitous Visions

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Lone Messenger

lines.flavourText:
"Try as I might, I could not escape it.
When I closed my eyes, I saw only death.
Each breath tainted with the scent of seared and smouldering flesh,
And each sound tangled with pleas for mercy."

lines.name: Fertile Mind
lines.flavourText:
"The swallow flew fast and took many turns,
spilling a seed where no plant had grown before. 
This seed grew and grew until the desert became fertile and abundant. 
Your mind is like this seed." 
- Maraketh Proverb

lines.name: Lioneye's Fall

explicitModifiers.text: Melee and Melee Weapon Type modifiers in Radius are Transformed to Bow Modifiers

lines.flavourText:
The shield crab does not leave his shell unless it is forced to, 
and even then, it knows to keep its distance.

lines.name: Pure Talent

explicitModifiers.text:
While your Passive Skill Tree connects to a class' starting location, you gain:
Marauder: Melee Skills have 25% increased Area of Effect
Duelist: 1% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Ranger: 7% increased Movement Speed
Shadow: +0.5% to Critical Strike Chance
Witch: 0.5% of Mana Regenerated per second
Templar: Damage Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
Scion: +25 to All Attributes

lines.flavourText:
The skilled know how to learn.
The talented know who to learn from.

lines.name: Replica Reckless Defence

explicitModifiers.text: +(2-6)% Chance to Block Spell Damage
+(2-6)% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+10% chance to be Frozen, Shocked and Ignited

lines.flavourText: "Prototype #298 must be contained in a non-conductive glass box at all times."

lines.name: Replica Pacifism
lines.flavourText:
"Release the type Delta test subjects. Unseal all prototype lockers.
Arm yourself! I know that, as researchers, you've never had to fight
before, but they're coming to kill us all. It's resist or die!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, two hours post-Incident

lines.name: Replica Powerlessness
lines.flavourText:
"The suppression troops have stopped responding to my orders.
I'm no longer in charge, and I likely never truly was... I suspect
they're already coming for us."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, one hour post-Incident

lines.name: Replica Primordial Might

explicitModifiers.text: -1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
(26-30)% increased Damage if you Summoned a Golem in the past 8 seconds
Golems Summoned in the past 8 seconds deal (100-124)% increased Damage
Golems have (18-22)% increased Maximum Life
Primordial
Summoned Golems are Aggressive

lines.flavourText:
"The summoned golems immediately battered through the chamber wall
and killed several guards, but their fury only lasted a short time."

lines.name: Atziri's Reign
lines.flavourText:
Atziri went to great lengths to ensure her immortality,
but nothing is eternal.

lines.name: Brute Force Solution
lines.flavourText:
Picking a lock takes an immense amount of skill and practice.
Breaking it with a hammer takes about three seconds.

lines.name: Chill of Corruption
lines.flavourText:
Even a millennium later, Atziri's presence
casts a shroud over Wraeclast.

lines.name: Dead Reckoning

explicitModifiers.text: Skeletons gain Added Chaos Damage equal to (20-30)% of Maximum Energy Shield on your Equipped Shield

lines.flavourText:
A mage from the coast rode up on a broken nag, legs burnt to his bones.
Before he collapsed, he uttered:
"I watched the world we know end yesterday."

lines.name: Efficient Training
lines.flavourText: Working smart and working hard aren't mutually exclusive.

lines.name: Energised Armour
lines.flavourText: "I've yet to see prayer stop an arrow."

lines.name: Fevered Mind
lines.flavourText: In sickness, the insane becomes sane.

lines.name: Fluid Motion
lines.flavourText: Even the strongest of steel can be made to bend.

lines.name: Fragility
lines.flavourText: "Your flesh will fail you."

lines.name: Hidden Potential
lines.flavourText:
The difference between the master and his apprentice
is what they see when they look at the same block of wood.

lines.name: Inertia
lines.flavourText: There is no force without movement.

lines.name: Pacifism
lines.flavourText: "Your fear will overcome you."

lines.name: Powerlessness
lines.flavourText: "Your desires will mislead you."

lines.name: Reckless Defence
lines.flavourText:
There's no motivation for genius
quite like desperation.

lines.name: Self-Flagellation
lines.flavourText: Beg for forgiveness.

lines.name: To Dust
lines.flavourText:
In the end, time comes for all of us.
For some, it comes much sooner.

lines.name: The Golden Rule
lines.flavourText: Hurt as you would be hurt.

lines.name: Might of the Meek

explicitModifiers.text: 50% increased Effect of non-Keystone Passive Skills in Radius
Notable Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing

lines.flavourText: Enough mice can kill a wolf.

lines.name: The Front Line

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Veteran's Awareness

lines.flavourText:
It was a great honour to fight at the front. 
The few that survived the initial charge were guaranteed fame and fortune.

lines.name: The Siege

explicitModifiers.text: Adds Kineticism

lines.flavourText:
As the dead battered Highgate's barricades,
The Black Sekhema accepted her fate,
And stood her ground.

lines.name: Firesong

explicitModifiers.text: +(10-15)% to Fire Resistance
Modifiers to Ignite Duration on you apply to all Elemental Ailments

lines.flavourText:
Within a firestorm, the Thane commands the flames
Emblazoned by glory and the song of the First Ones
For the master of fire fears nothing.

lines.name: Witchbane

explicitModifiers.text: +(5-13) to Intelligence

When you Kill an Enemy Cursed with a Non-Aura Hex, become Immune to
Curses for remaining Hex Duration

lines.flavourText:
In darkest night, 'neath waxen moon
A witch snatches a boy from his room.
He wards off her hexes
The witch he perplexes
And so becomes part of her stew.
